name: Iso11783OPSetAudioVolume
title: Iso11783OPSetAudioVolume
syntax: long Iso11783OPSetAudioVolume( dword ecuHandle, dword volume );
description: The function sets the audio volume of the Virtual Terminal. A Set Audio Volume command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
